---
pagetitle: Job Listings | FishMIP
description-meta: |
    A list of current job listings that might be of interest to FishMIP members and researchers.

listing: 
- id: jobs-academic
  contents: 
    - "../jobs/*qmd"
    - "!../blogs/dummy-blog-post.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  image-placeholder: "../images/icons/scroll-solid-full.png"
  include:
    type: academic
---

::: {.column-screen style="margin-top: -2.9em;"}
![](../images/shutterstock_169126697%20(4).jpeg){.banner fig-align="center"}
:::

# Current Job Listings

Below you'll find a list of current job listings that might be of interest to FishMIP members and researchers. To submit a job listing for this page, fill out [this form](https://forms.gle/sjEBYrJxq5KsRWM8A).

::: {#jobs-academic}

:::

::: {#jobs-professional}

:::

::: {#jobs-hdr}

:::

::: {#jobs-other}

:::
